name: WebDecoy
description: Zero-configuration WordPress plugin with invisible honeypot fields, behavioral analysis, and SHA-256 proof-of-work challenges to detect bots, headless browsers, and automation frameworks. Tool: https://github.com/WebDecoy/wordpress-plugin. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #387 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map WebDecoy output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
